nodes.label: पापा जब बच्चे थे
nodes.description: A story about a father sharing his childhood memories with his children

nodes.label: पात्र (Characters)
nodes.description: The main characters in the story - Papa and his children

nodes.label: पापा (Papa)
nodes.description: The father who shares his childhood memories and stories of mischief

nodes.label: बच्चे (Children)
nodes.description: Papa's children who listen to his stories with surprise and joy

nodes.label: बचपन की यादें (Childhood Memories)
nodes.description: The collection of fun experiences Papa shares from his childhood days

nodes.label: शरारतें (Pranks)
nodes.description: The mischievous acts Papa did - climbing trees, playing pranks on friends

nodes.label: खेल-कूद (Games & Play)
nodes.description: Outdoor games, running around, and playing with friends in the neighborhood

nodes.label: डाँट (Scolding)
nodes.description: Getting scolded by elders for being naughty - a common childhood experience

nodes.label: मुख्य विषय (Themes)
nodes.description: The main themes and messages of the story

nodes.label: परिवार का बंधन (Family Bond)
nodes.description: Sharing memories brings families closer together

nodes.label: समझ (Understanding)
nodes.description: Parents understand children because they were once children too

nodes.label: भाषा सीखना (Language Learning)
nodes.description: New Hindi words: बचपन, शरारत, याद, नटखट, डाँटना

nodes.label: भूतकाल (Past Tense)
nodes.description: The story uses past tense: था, थे, थी - to talk about things that happened before

nodes.label: सीख (Moral)
nodes.description: Every adult was once a child - sharing stories builds love and understanding
